meta.title: Open Top Dry Containers — 20ft & 40ft | Crystal Group
meta.description: Open top containers with removable tarpaulin roof for crane or forklift top-loading. Ideal for oversized cargo, machinery, and construction materials. Sale & lease pan-India.

hero.name: Open Top Dry Containers
hero.tagline: Removable tarpaulin roof for easy top-loading of heavy and oversized cargo using cranes or forklifts.

overview: Open Top Dry Containers are designed for easy top-loading of heavy and oversized cargo. These containers feature a removable tarpaulin roof for loading bulky items like machinery, construction materials, mining equipment, and agricultural goods. Available for sale and lease — new and used units inspected before delivery.

features.title: Open-Top Design
features.desc: Removable tarpaulin roof for loading oversized cargo using cranes or forklifts — no height restrictions.

features.title: ISO-Certified Dimensions
features.desc: Compatible with international shipping and logistics systems for seamless multimodal transport.

features.title: Weatherproof Cover
features.desc: Tarpaulin roof is tightly secured with locking mechanisms, protecting cargo from rain, dust, and harsh environmental elements.

features.title: Forklift & Crane Access
features.desc: Enables easy loading and unloading of heavy, bulky goods that cannot fit through standard container doors.

faq.a: Open top containers are specialised shipping containers with removable rooftops, allowing easy loading and unloading of oversized cargo from above using cranes or forklifts.

faq.q: What types of cargo are best suited?
faq.a: Open top containers are ideal for transporting bulky items such as machinery, equipment, and materials that exceed standard height limits.

faq.q: Are containers available for both sale and rent?
faq.a: Yes. Crystal Group offers both new and used open top dry containers for sale and lease, providing flexible options to meet your specific needs.

faq.q: How does the tarpaulin roof protect cargo?
faq.a: The tarpaulin roof is tightly secured using locking mechanisms and ensures that cargo remains protected from rain, dust, and other environmental factors during transit.

faq.q: Can open top containers be customised?
faq.a: Yes, they can be modified based on specific requirements, including additional reinforcements, customised doors, internal padding, or ventilation systems for sensitive cargo.

faq.q: Are they suitable for long-term storage?
faq.a: Absolutely. These containers can be used for both transportation and long-term storage of bulky or irregularly shaped goods, provided they are secured properly.
Cargo is typically loaded using cranes or forklifts from the top, making it easier to handle oversized or heavy materials compared to side or rear-loading methods.

faq.q: Do open top containers have end doors?
faq.a: Yes. These containers are equipped with doors on one end, providing easy access, while the open top design offers flexibility for loading large items that cannot fit through standard container doors.
